label: The Writbound Ledger
description: The Writbound Ledger serves as a licensed stationer and charter-copy shop set into Cindervale’s ancient masonry, its frontage braced with blackened brick and riveted iron. Iron-grilled windows display ink blocks, wax seals, and stamped license tabs under posted excerpts of toll schedules and quarantine ordinances. The interior is arranged around high copy-desks and lockable pigeonholes, with a fireproof alcove for contract chests and registry folios. A wall of notice-boards reproduces sanctioned proclamations and interdictions against Ahm’a and Limbo breach-zones in a hand standardized to the city’s oath-hall forms.
